title: cichorium intybus subsp. pumilum
intro: Cichorium intybus subsp. pumilum, also known as the small-flowered chicory, is a subspecies of the wild chicory plant. It is a type of perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cichorium intybus subsp. pumilum include its ability to stimulate digestion, improve liver function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
